underlying_goal: Auto-generate a thorough, expert-level discussion of gray areas for Phase 7 (Feedback System) of the robotic-psalms project, iteratively exploring design decisions and producing a CONTEXT.md for downstream agents
brief_summary: User requested an auto-generated iterative discussion of gray areas for Phase 7 Feedback System, and Claude systematically explored ~12 design dimensions via iterative questions, then produced a comprehensive CONTEXT.md.
